action.finish_summary: Elicited requirements for the Lei Feng Wisdom Community website: 1) Two user roles - community members (can register, participate in events, view personal point records) and administrators (manage members and community information). 2) Point reward system where members can earn and view points, though specific earning/redemption mechanisms, expiration policies, and deduction capabilities remain unspecified. 3) Community information display includes introductions, news, events, and community dynamics. 4) UI design preference: light sky blue background with deepskyblue UI components. Many detailed specifications (registration fields, approval workflow, event signup process, point crediting mechanism, leaderboard visibility, notifications, administrator capabilities) remain undecided by the user.
